mapper.sql: id, event_id, source_ip, attack_type, risk_level, start_time, end_time, duration_seconds, total_requests, peak_rps, attack_count, confidence_start, confidence_end, defense_action, defense_expire_time, defense_success, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_attack_event ( event_id, source_ip, attack_type, risk_level, start_time, end_time, duration_seconds, total_requests, peak_rps, attack_count, confidence_start, confidence_end, defense_action, defense_expire_time, defense_success, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{eventId}, #{sourceIp}, #{attackType}, #{riskLevel}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{durationSeconds}, #{totalRequests}, #{peakRps}, #{attackCount}, #{confidenceStart}, #{confidenceEnd}, #{defenseAction}, #{defenseExpireTime}, #{defenseSuccess}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_attack_event SET source_ip = #{sourceIp}, attack_type = #{attackType}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, end_time = #{endTime}, duration_seconds = #{durationSeconds}, total_requests = #{totalRequests}, peak_rps = #{peakRps}, attack_count = #{attackCount}, confidence_start = #{confidenceStart}, confidence_end = #{confidenceEnd}, defense_action = #{defenseAction}, defense_expire_time = #{defenseExpireTime}, defense_success = #{defenseSuccess}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_attack_event WHERE source_ip = #{sourceIp} AND status = 0 ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_attack_event SET attack_count = attack_count + 1, total_requests = total_requests + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_attack_event SET total_requests = #{totalRequests}, peak_rps = #{peakRps}, confidence_end = #{confidenceEnd}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_attack_event SET end_time = #{endTime}, duration_seconds = #{durationSeconds}, status = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT attack_type AS attackType, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sys_attack_event GROUP BY attack_type
SELECT risk_level AS riskLevel, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sys_attack_event GROUP BY risk_level

SELECT STR_TO_DATE(time_str, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS time, count FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') AS time_str, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sys_attack_event WHERE start_time >= #{startTime} AND start_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') ) t ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT FROM sys_attack_event ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_attack_event WHERE status = 0
SELECT AVG(duration_seconds) FROM sys_attack_event WHERE duration_seconds IS NOT NULL AND duration_seconds > 0
